en.name: 2048 Cupcakes
en.desc: A delicious twist on the classic 2048 game! Combine matching cupcakes to create new flavors. Can you reach the Rainbow cupcake?
en.howToPlay: Use Arrow Keys or the buttons to slide all cupcakes in one direction. When two cupcakes of the same type collide, they merge into a better cupcake. Reach the Rainbow (2048) to win!
tips: Keep your highest cupcakes in a corner
Build along one edge when possible
Plan ahead to avoid blocking yourself
Don't fill up the board completely!

zh.name: 2048纸杯蛋糕
zh.desc: 经典2048游戏的甜蜜改编！组合匹配的纸杯蛋糕来创造新口味。你能达到彩虹纸杯蛋糕吗？
zh.howToPlay: 使用方向键或按钮将所有纸杯蛋糕向一个方向滑动。当两个相同类型的纸杯蛋糕碰撞时，它们会合并成更好的纸杯蛋糕。达到彩虹(2048)获胜！
tips: 将最高级的纸杯蛋糕保持在角落
尽可能沿着一条边缘建立
提前计划以避免卡住自己
